title: Research
text:
Research


Publications








J. Langbein. M. Moreno-Zambrano and K. Siebert. How do goats “read” 2D-images of familiar and unfamiliar conspecifics?. Frontiers in Psychology, 14, 2023. 






M. Moreno-Zambrano, M. S. Ullrich, and M-T. Hütt. Exploring cocoa bean fermentation mechanisms by kinetic modelling. Royal Society Open Science, 9(2), 2022. 






R. Megias-Perez, M. Moreno-Zambrano, B. Behrends, M. Corno, and N. Kuhnert. Monitoring the changes of low molecular weight carbohydrates in cocoa beans during spontaneous fermentation: a chemometric and kinetic approach. Food Research International, 2019. 






M. Moreno-Zambrano, S. Grimbs, M. S. Ullrich, and M-T. Hütt. A mathematical model of cocoa bean fermentation. Royal Society Open Science, 5(10), 2018. 






F. J. Flores, S. M. Marek, J. A. Anderson, T. K. Mitchell, M. Moreno-Zambrano, and N. R. Walker. Reactive oxygen species production and alternative hosts of spring dead spot-causing fungi. International Turfgrass Society and ACSESS, 13:213–224, 2017.

title: Privacy Policy

No personal data is collected directly through forms or user accounts.

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Hosting
This website is hosted through GitHub Pages.
GitHub may process technical information such as IP addresses and server logs as part of providing the hosting service.

title: Privacy Policy
text:

This website contains links to external websites, including LinkedIn and Google Scholar.
When visiting external websites, their respective privacy policies apply.

title: Privacy Policy

Cookies
This website does not use tracking cookies, analytics services, or advertising technologies.
